command:
echo "=== CHECK NGINX CONFIG on vm-openclaw ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 '
echo "--- nginx sites ---"
ls /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/
cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/* 2>/dev/null | head -80
echo "--- openclaw config gateway section ---"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\"/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json\")); print(json.dumps(d.get(\"gateway\",{}), indent=2))" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- openclaw webhook path ---"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\"/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json\")); print(json.dumps(d.get(\"telegram\",{}), indent=2))" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- test local 8787 ---"
curl -s --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8787/telegram-webhook || echo "FAILED"
echo "--- test local 9119 ---"
curl -s --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:9119/telegram-webhook || echo "FAILED"
echo "--- test local 9119 root ---"
curl -s --max-time 5 http://localhost:9119/ | head -5
' 2>&1
